title: Plugin registry meta-schema (RFC-008 M1, M3, M8, R8 typed+versioned)
description: plugins/_index.json — single source of truth. additionalProperties:false at every level; closed enums for harness, status, capability tier, classifier mode, and plugin type. Every entry declares a closed `type` (R8 typed-registry, RFC-008 L116); the registry carries a REQUIRED semver `schema_version` (R8 versioned-contract, RFC-008 L118). Per-type dispatch, schema_version range enforcement (backward validate / fail-closed-forward when a registry version exceeds the validator max — MAJOR OR MINOR), id==harness, and bidirectional registry<->disk are validate-plugin-registry.mjs (P1) checks. Top-level additionalProperties:false is the STATIC fail-closed for unknown future top-level keys; a new substrate-capability type (store-strategy/learning) is added as an additive-MINOR superset bump that ships its own slot + descriptor (CAPABILITIES.md).

pluginType.description: Closed plugin-type space — the R8 typed-registry discriminator (RFC-008 L116). `enforcement` is the sole enforcement-layer type (bound to bp-XXX, R2); `recall-strategy` / `store-strategy` / `learning` are substrate capabilities (CAPABILITIES.md) that USE episodes and contain no gate/marker/workflow logic (R1). store-strategy and learning have NO descriptor or registry slot yet — each is added later as an additive-MINOR superset bump that ships its own registry sub-schema, descriptor schema, runtime-IO schema, and conformance gauntlet (R11 -> RFC-007 store; R12 -> RFC-001 learning).

installed_state.description: Optional (M9). When present, validated against installed-state.schema.json.

activationDescriptor.description: RFC-009 R3 — the advisory activation adapter: enforcement-LAYER-hosted (hook-shaped, per-project, P12) but contractually ADVISORY. `blocking` is a const false so 'never gates' is a schema invariant, not just a conformance test. No `classifier` (activation does not classify). Capabilities cover the prompt/tool/session-start event surfaces it may register.

installed_state.description: Optional (M9). When present, validated against installed-state.schema.json.
